puzzles.prompt: Assemble one line of code to respond. Walk onto blocks and press Enter to build your line, then stand on ▶ Run.

payload.scenario: You look around and find yourself looking at a blue planet. You can barely see them — they wave at you and wait for you to respond.
payload.goal: Greet them. Make your program say: hello world

beats.build-first: 🐍 The snake isn't ready — you haven't BUILT the line yet. Stand on Build and press Enter first.
beats.wrong-order: The words tumble out jumbled. The aliens tilt their heads. Try them in a different order.
beats.wrong-indent: The line drifts off its margin. Slide it left until it sits against the wall (indent 0).
beats.wrong-word: The panel doesn't recognize one of those words. Pick different words and try again.
beats.extra-code: There's more than one line of code in the panel. Clear everything except a single print hello world against the left wall.
beats.success: The aliens light up and wave back! ✅
beats.first_run_no_build: 🐍 Whoa — you ran before BUILDING. Stand on Build and press Enter to compile your line first, then come back to Run.

on_enter.speaker: snake
on_enter.text: Sssss! Welcome to the play house.

on_enter.speaker: snake
on_enter.text: Maybe you could write a message for the friends watching from that little blue planet? They've waited so long to hear from someone.

on_enter.speaker: snake
on_enter.text: I can't hold a pen — no hands! — but a printer can speak for me.

on_enter.speaker: snake
on_enter.text: Stuck? The friend over there with the ❓ can help.

hints.text: Greet them — make the program say hello.
The snake can't write, but it can use a printer. Reach for print.
Lay print then the word against the left wall (indent 0): print("hello").

guided_tutorial.speaker: narrator
guided_tutorial.text: This is a code puzzle. Let's learn how it works.

guided_tutorial.speaker: narrator
guided_tutorial.text: Walk up to a word on the floor and press I to pick it up.

guided_tutorial.speaker: narrator
guided_tutorial.text: Walk to an empty tile and press P to place it down.

guided_tutorial.speaker: narrator
guided_tutorial.text: Stand on Build and press Enter to compile your line.

guided_tutorial.speaker: narrator
guided_tutorial.text: Stand on Run and press Enter to see what your line does.

hints: The snake doesn't have hands to write, but it can use a printer.

puzzles.prompt: Use what you discovered to introduce yourself.

payload.scenario: The aliens point at you, curious. A nameplate on your pod reads ‘Sam’. They want to know who you are.
payload.goal: Tell them your name. Make your program say: Sam

hints: You already know the command that shows text — check your Codex.
Put the right name inside the quotes.

puzzles.prompt: A locked door panel is waiting for the right word.

payload.scenario: You reach a sealed door. A glowing panel listens for a single spoken word to release the lock.
payload.goal: Make the panel hear the word: open

hints: Same command as before — just a different word.
‘input’ asks for text; you want to SAY text.
